About Us

Your Gateway to Authentic Sri Lanka

Lanka Smart Tours Private Limited, established in 2015, has evolved into a distinguished player in Sri Lanka's travel industry. With a dedicated team of 20 experts in the travel and tourism sector, we specialize in crafting unforgettable travel experiences that showcase the very best of this tropical paradise. From ancient Buddhist temples to thrilling wildlife safaris, we bring you closer to the heart of Sri Lanka.

Founded by the visionary Iresh Kumara — a distinguished Professional Gemologist, certified tour guide, and registered chauffeur with over two decades of expertise — Lanka Smart Tours has grown from a sole proprietorship into a registered private limited company. With strategic partnerships extending across Australia, Canada, the USA, and the UK, we are architects of experiences committed to turning your travel dreams into a vivid reality. We are registered under the Sri Lanka Tourism Development Authority (SLTDA).

Find us on TripAdvisor, Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok to see what our happy travelers have to say.

Our Vision

To be Sri Lanka's most trusted and innovative tour operator, delivering authentic travel experiences that connect the world with the island's rich heritage, breathtaking landscapes, and warm hospitality.

Our Mission

To craft personalized, safe, and affordable travel experiences that exceed expectations, while promoting sustainable tourism and empowering local communities across Sri Lanka.

Our Tours

Our Tour Experiences

Whether you seek cultural immersion, wildlife encounters, or beachside relaxation, we have the perfect tour package for you.

Cultural Triangle Tour

08 Days · 07 Nights

Explore ancient cities of Anuradhapura, Polonnaruwa, and the magnificent Sigiriya Rock Fortress. Dive deep into Sri Lanka's rich Buddhist heritage and discover centuries-old temples, stupas, and royal palaces.

Wildlife Safari Tour

15 Days · 12 Nights

Encounter leopards, elephants, and exotic birds in Yala, Udawalawe, and Wilpattu National Parks. Our expert guides know the best spots for unforgettable wildlife sightings and photography.

Hill Country & Tea Tour

06 Days · 05 Nights

Journey through misty mountains, rolling tea plantations, and charming colonial towns. Experience the famous train ride from Kandy to Ella and visit a working tea factory.

Beach Stay

07 Days · 06 Nights

Relax on golden southern beaches, explore Galle Fort, go whale watching in Mirissa, and enjoy fresh seafood. Perfect for those seeking sun, surf, and serenity by the Indian Ocean.

Buddhist Pilgrimage Tour

13 Days · 12 Nights

Visit sacred Buddhist sites including Temple of the Tooth, Dambulla Cave Temple, and Adam's Peak. A spiritually enriching journey through Sri Lanka's most revered Buddhist landmarks and monasteries.

Adventure & Trekking Tour

08 Days · 07 Nights

Hike through rainforests, climb Adam's Peak at sunrise, trek to Ella Rock, and explore Knuckles Mountain Range. Ideal for thrill-seekers looking for off-the-beaten-path experiences.

Special Group Tours

06 Days · 05 Nights

Budget-friendly group tours for 10 or more travellers. Explore Sri Lanka's top attractions together with shared transport, group accommodation, and expert guidance at an unbeatable value. Perfect for friends, families, and organisations.

Why Choose Us

The Lanka Smart
Tours

01

Certified Local Guides

Our guides are professionally certified with deep knowledge of Sri Lankan history, culture, and wildlife. They speak English fluently and are passionate about sharing their homeland with you.

02

Fully Customizable Tours

Every tour is tailored to your preferences, pace, and interests. Whether you want a relaxing beach holiday or an action-packed adventure, we design the perfect itinerary just for you.

03

Safe & Reliable Transport

Travel in comfort with our well-maintained vehicles and experienced drivers. From airport pickups to cross-country journeys, your safety and comfort are always our top priority.

04

Affordable Excellence

Premium experiences at competitive prices starting from just $80/day. We believe exceptional travel should be accessible to everyone without compromising on quality or service.

05

24/7 Support

From your first inquiry to the end of your trip, our team is available around the clock. We are just a WhatsApp message away for any questions or assistance you need.

Based in Colombo

Operating across all of Sri Lanka

Our Team

Meet the Experts Behind Your Journey

Our team of seasoned professionals brings decades of combined experience in Sri Lankan travel and tourism.

Iresh Kumara

Founder & Chief Executive Officer

The visionary Founder and CEO of Lanka Smart Tours Private Limited. A distinguished Professional Gemologist, certified tour guide, and registered chauffeur with over two decades of expertise in the travel and tourism industry. He is currently immersed in a captivating publication project unveiling the enchanting stories behind hidden monasteries in Sri Lanka.

Charitha Perera

Coordinating Manager — USA & Canada

With over 15 years of experience in travel and tourism, Charith previously managed at Dialog Axiata. As President of Lions Club, Nugegoda, his community service reflects his dedication. Now based in Canada, he coordinates unforgettable journeys with unmatched expertise and warmth.

Houstan Wijerathne

Coordinating Manager — UK

With two decades of travel and tourism experience and a tourism degree from the University of Kelaniya, Houstan is also a National Guide Lecturer. Based in the UK, he connects travelers with the wonders of Sri Lanka enriched by his passion and knowledge.

Lashika Perera

Travel Designer

With a keen eye for detail and a passion for crafting unforgettable experiences, Lashika brings creativity and expertise to every journey. Her commitment to curating personalized itineraries ensures each traveler discovers Sri Lanka in a way that resonates uniquely with them.

Nadee Shanuka

Accountant

A seasoned Accountant with over a decade of financial expertise in travel and tourism. Possessing a specialized Business Management Degree, her meticulous approach and industry knowledge contribute to the financial stability that underpins seamless experiences for travelers.

W.A. Susantha

English-Speaking Tour Guide

An English-speaking guide lecturer with over 20 years of expertise who enriches Lanka Smart Tours with his profound knowledge, engaging storytelling, and passion for delivering immersive experiences. He also provides training for the team of tour guides.

Irosh Perera

German-Speaking Tour Guide

A German-speaking tour guide with over two decades of experience, Irosh brings a wealth of cultural insight and seamless communication, enhancing the company's ability to cater to diverse audiences and ensuring exceptional travel for German-speaking visitors.

Ajith Kaluwamodara

German-Speaking Tour Guide

A seasoned German-speaking guide with extensive experience, Ajith brings his linguistic proficiency and passion for storytelling to Lanka Smart Tours, making him an invaluable asset in providing high-level experiences for German-speaking visitors.
